data.biography: Gilbert Owuor is a Kenyan-American actor known for his roles as Bash in Reprisal (TV series) , Maksim in Mute (2018 film), Father Anan in Goliath (TV series), Craig in Calls (TV series), Paul Decker in No Man of God, Minus in True Blood, Ronald in The Newsroom (American TV series), and Malik in Castle (TV series).
data.name: Gilbert Owuor

data.biography: 吉尔伯特·奥武尔 （Gilbert Owuor） 是一位肯尼亚裔美国演员
data.name: 吉尔伯特·奥武尔

data.biography: 吉爾伯特·奧武爾 （Gilbert Owuor） 是一位肯亞裔美國演員
data.name: 吉爾伯特·奧武爾
